category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an LSP for LanguageTool with support for LaTeX, Markdown, and others; official GitHub repository describes the same role.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ltex-ls; official repository title is LTeX Language Server.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official LTeX documentation website.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies LanguageTool LSP support for LaTeX and Markdown; source_facts.executables lists ltex-ls and ltex-cli.
